gen_vhost.infrastructure.icli_command module¶

icli_command.py

Info

Defines abstract ICLICommand strategy interface and CommandOption.

class gen_vhost.infrastructure.icli_command.ICLICommand[source]¶

Bases: IOptionCommand

Abstract base class representing a CLI subcommand strategy.

It defines:

attributes:

None.

methods:
name - Property returning name of the command.
help_text - Property returning help text of the command.
options - Property returning list of command options.
execute - Performs subcommand actions.
__str__ - Returns the string representation of the command.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract execute(params: dict[str, Any], service: IFileGen) → dict[str, Any][source]¶

Executes the file generation logic for this command.

Parameters:

  • params (<dict[str, Any]>) – Subcommand parameters from CLI parser.

  • service (<IFileGen>) – Generation orchestrator service instance.

Returns:

Return code, stdout and stderr messages.

Return type:

<dict[str, Any]>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract property help_text: str¶

Returns the command help text.

Returns:

The command help text.

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract property name: str¶

Returns the command name key.

Returns:

The command name key.

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract property options: list[CommandOption]¶

Returns the command options.

Returns:

List of command options.

Return type:

<List[CommandOption]>

Exceptions:

None.
